---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve the daily report skill
title: "[Feature] Brief description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Idea

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves

What problem does this feature address? What use case does it enable?

## 📝 Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include any config changes, CLI flags, or output format ideas.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Other ways to solve this problem (if any).

## 📊 Additional Context

Screenshots, examples from other tools, or any other context.
